ham.subject: Out of Office: Jane Doe – 15 – 19 May 2026
ham.body:
Hi team,

I will be out of the office from Monday, May 15 to Friday, May 19, returning to work on Monday, May 22. I will have limited access to email during this period.

For any urgent matters, please contact my colleague Tom Smith (tom.smith@company.com) or the support desk at support@company.com.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Jane Doe
Senior Project Manager
(555) 123‑4567

spam.subject: URGENT: FedEx Delivery Fee Verification Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear FedEx Customer,

Our records indicate that your recent shipment (Tracking # 987654321) was not delivered due to a missing delivery fee. In order to prevent any interruption to your account and avoid additional fees, we urgently require you to confirm the payment details.

Please log in to your FedEx account and verify your payment information by clicking the button below:

<URL>

If you do not act within 24 hours, your account will be suspended and all future shipments will be delayed until the issue is resolved.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Delivery Services
Customer Support Team
(800) 463‑3339
